creator: bourne.identity@hotmail.com
text:
I am on a Manjaro Linux host with FreeBSD 13.0 RELEASE as the guest.

Bi-directional clipboard does not work for me, even though the setting is enabled in the VirtualBox host.

The shared clipboard simply does not work. I am using VMSVGA as the graphics controller, and my host's VirtualBox complains of Invalid Settings if I try to switch to VBoxSVGA.
